curated.title: feat(webapi): implement W3C File API
curated.note: W3C File API surface implemented in Zig for an AI-agent headless browser.

curated.title: gh-150311: Fix minor issues in configure.ac for the CYGWIN port
curated.note: Build-system fix accepted into the reference Python implementation.

curated.title: feat(rust): support datafusion expressions for merge insert predicates
curated.note: DataFusion expressions for merge-insert predicates in a production columnar format.

curated.title: fix(proxy): don't enforce budgets on model-discovery / info routes (#27923)
curated.note: Stopped budget enforcement on model-discovery and info routes.

curated.title: feat(rust): support datafusion expressions for merge insert predicates
curated.note: The same DataFusion capability carried into LanceDB's Rust core.

curated.title: fix(python): run AsyncTable.search embeddings on a dedicated executor
curated.note: Moved embedding search onto a dedicated executor to stop event-loop stalls.

curated.title: Implement input type=file support (FileList, input.files/value, DOM.setFileInputFiles)
curated.note: Completed file-input support, from FileList through DOM.setFileInputFiles.

curated.title: feat(proxy): add disable_budget_reservation general setting (#27639)
curated.note: Added a proxy-wide setting to disable budget reservation.

curated.title: fix(python): raise clear TypeError for bare List/Tuple in pydantic schema conversion
curated.note: Fixed opaque AttributeError for bare List/Tuple generics in Pydantic schema conversion, raising a clear TypeError instead.

curated.title: fix(rust): return typed errors instead of panicking in Bedrock embedding path
curated.note: Replaced panic paths in the Bedrock embedding provider with typed error returns across serialization, API, and runtime failure modes.

curated.title: fix(proxy): release max_parallel_requests slot when a stream is cancelled mid-flight (#27955)
curated.note: Stopped a cancelled stream from stranding its max_parallel_requests slot, which had been pinning capped keys at their limit.

curated.title: feat(proxy): surface max_input_tokens/max_output_tokens on /v1/models
curated.note: Surfaced max_input_tokens and max_output_tokens on /v1/models for accurate client-side capacity planning.

curated.title: feat(proxy): serve Anthropic-native /v1/models for Claude Code gateway discovery
curated.note: Enabled Anthropic-native model discovery for Claude Code gateway deployments.

curated.title: feat(cdp): implement Browser.setDownloadBehavior file downloads
curated.note: Implemented Browser.setDownloadBehavior for CDP-driven file download automation.

curated.title: fix: evaluate all list-element docs in FTS prefilter walk-the-allowlist branch
curated.note: Fixed incorrect evaluation of list-element docs in the FTS prefilter walk-the-allowlist branch.

curated.title: fix: merge_insert silently drops matches when a leading payload column is all-null
curated.note: Critical fix: merge_insert silently dropped matched rows when the leading payload column was all-null.

curated.title: sysupdate: refuse reboot/pending logic when --component= is used
curated.note: Fixed incorrect reboot/pending logic in sysupdate when --component= is used. First PR merged into systemd.

curated.title: fix(openai): preserve cache_control for openai-compatible custom endpoints
curated.note: Preserved cache_control headers for OpenAI-compatible custom endpoints, fixing silent cache bypass.
